tagline: Relaxing and care free pools are our business!

hero.headline: 77 Years of Trusted Pool Care
hero.subheadline: Since 1949, Pensacola families have relied on Aqua Pool & Patio for everything from construction to weekly maintenance. With 60+ professionals and two locations, we keep Northwest Florida swimming year-round.
checkmarks: 90% of local commercial pools trust us

services.headline: Complete Pool & Patio Solutions
services.subtitle: From construction to weekly care, one trusted team handles it all under one roof.

cards.title: Pool Construction
cards.description: Custom in-ground pools designed and built with 77 years of craftsmanship for homes and businesses across Northwest Florida.

cards.title: Pool Renovations
cards.description: Breathe new life into aging pools with expert resurfacing, retiling, modern deck upgrades, and complete remodels.

cards.title: Weekly Maintenance
cards.description: Reliable weekly and bi-weekly cleaning, chemical balancing, and equipment inspections that keep your water crystal clear.

cards.title: Commercial Pool Management
cards.description: Trusted by 90% of commercial pools in the area — hotels, HOAs, and fitness centers depend on our consistent service.

cards.title: Spa & Hot Tub Installation
cards.description: Custom-built spas and hot tubs that transform your backyard into a private retreat for year-round relaxation.

cards.title: Equipment & Supplies
cards.description: Full-service pool store with pumps, filters, chemicals, and free water testing at both our Pensacola and Fort Walton locations.

steps.title: Schedule Your Visit
steps.description: Call or fill out our form. We'll set up a convenient time to assess your pool or discuss your project.

steps.title: Get a Custom Plan
steps.description: Our experts evaluate your needs and present a clear plan — whether it's a new build, renovation, or maintenance program.

steps.title: Enjoy Your Pool
steps.description: We handle the work while you relax. Join 700+ homeowners who never worry about their pool again.

about.label: About Aqua Pool & Patio
about.headline: Northwest Florida's Most Established Pool Company
about.description: Founded in 1949 as a small chemical company, we've grown into a full-service pool and patio operation with over 60 employees across two locations. Our team's average tenure exceeds 20 years because we treat our people like family — and that care shows in every pool we build, renovate, and maintain. Three generations of Pensacola families have trusted us with their backyard retreats.

features.title: Two Locations, One Standard
features.description: Convenient service from both our Pensacola and Fort Walton Beach offices, with the same quality you've trusted since 1949.

features.title: BBB A+ Rated Since 2007
features.description: Our Better Business Bureau accreditation and A+ rating reflect our commitment to doing right by every customer, every time.

features.title: Full-Service Under One Roof
features.description: Construction, renovation, weekly maintenance, and supplies — one trusted team handles everything so you never juggle multiple vendors.

pricing.headline: Transparent, Fair Pricing
pricing.subtitle: No hidden fees. No surprise charges. Get a detailed quote before any work begins — that's been our promise for 77 years.

guarantee.headline: Our 77-Year Reputation Guarantee
guarantee.description: We've been in business since 1949 because we stand behind every job. If you're not completely satisfied with our work, we'll make it right at no additional cost. Our BBB A+ rating and decades of repeat customers are proof that your satisfaction is our top priority.

faqs.question: What areas do you serve?
faqs.answer: We serve Pensacola, Fort Walton Beach, and the surrounding Northwest Florida communities from our two convenient locations.

faqs.question: How often should my pool be serviced?
faqs.answer: We recommend weekly service for most residential pools in our Florida climate. We also offer bi-weekly programs for pools with lighter usage. Our team will assess your specific needs during your free consultation.

faqs.question: Do you handle both residential and commercial pools?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We currently maintain over 700 residential pools and service 90% of commercial pools in our area, including hotels, HOAs, and fitness centers.

faqs.question: How long does a pool construction project take?
faqs.answer: Most residential pool builds take 8-12 weeks depending on complexity, permits, and weather. We'll give you a detailed timeline during your consultation and keep you updated throughout the process.

faqs.question: Do you offer free water testing?
faqs.answer: Yes! Bring a water sample to either our Pensacola or Fort Walton Beach location and we'll test it for free. We'll recommend the exact chemicals you need to keep your water balanced and safe.

testimonials.name: Satisfied Customer
testimonials.text: Office Staff and Service Department with pool cleaning service are just outstanding. Everyone is knowledgeable, very professional, extremely friendly, with outstanding customer service and fair pricing.

testimonials.name: Happy Homeowner
testimonials.text: The company did a great job, from start to finish. We are very pleased with their work, and we would use them again.

testimonials.name: Long-time Client
testimonials.text: Aqua Pool & Patio goes above and beyond with their customers and service. My family has used their company for years for regular pool maintenance.

contact.headline: Ready for a Worry-Free Pool?
contact.subtitle: Get in touch with our team — we've been helping Pensacola families enjoy their pools since 1949.

footer.description: Aqua Pool & Patio has served Northwest Florida since 1949, providing pool construction, renovation, maintenance, and supplies from our two locations in Pensacola and Fort Walton Beach.
